## Summary
The Indonesia Stock Exchange Composite Index (IHSG) declined 0.52% on Monday April 20, 2026, reflecting broad market weakness ahead of the BI rate meeting.

## Key Points
• IHSG closed down 0.52% Monday April 20
• Broad-based selling across sectors
• Pre-BI meeting caution weighed on sentiment
• Foreign flow dynamics contributed to pressure
• Market breadth negative with more decliners

## Portfolio Impact
🟡 **Neutral** — IHSG weakness Monday (-0.52%) was broad-based but your commodity positions (ESSA, PTPS, PGEO, ITMG) showed resilience with strong Tuesday recovery (+1.08% portfolio gain). Your portfolio beta to IHSG appears lower due to commodity focus.
